Grid Full Syntax

[Grid: Full Tour]
A    || G7 . | %  . | %% . | .  . |
     | C7 . | %  . || G7 . | %  . ||
     |: C7 . | %  . :|: G7 . | %  . :| repeat 4 times
Coda | D7 . | Eb7  | D7   | G7 . | %  . |.

[Grid]
| C ~A . . | C ~A . . |
|s dn~up dn~up ~up dn~up | dn~up dn~up ~up dn~up |
| D . . . | % . . . |
